name: cross_direct
description: Cross-file: processor.py calls fetch_record() defined in data_source.py. fetch_record returns None; process_record subscripts the result without a guard. Tests cross-file unique-name resolution for a bare (non-qualified) call.
analysis_note: Both files registered in Workspace. workspace_summaries: fetch_record uniquely named → base_return=Nullable. process_record: record=fetch_record() → apply_workspace_summary → Nullable. Consumer(record, Subscript) in processor.py fires. Regression attributed to file=processor.py.
task: process_record() in processor.py calls fetch_record() from data_source.py, which returns None when the record is not found. process_record() then subscripts the result without a None check. Fix processor.py to handle the None case.
